title: Moss Addon
description: Lightweight Fabric Mod addon for Cactus Mod that adds a new module category with additional client-side functionality
body:
Moss Addon is a lightweight Fabric Mod addon for [Cactus Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cactus) . It adds a "Moss" category with utility, visual and other modules.

## Features
- **Brand Name Changer**: Customize reported client brand (e.g. `fabric`, `vanilla`, custom).
- **Arrow Trails**: Colorful particle effects on arrows with full customization options.
- **Damage Indicator**: Clear visual damage feedback on hits.

More features coming soon.

## Why Moss?
Enhances Cactus with subtle QoL and visuals. Fully optional, client-side, no cheats or bloat.

## Installation
1. Install Fabric Loader, Fabric API, and Cactus Mod.
2. Add Moss JAR to `mods/` folder.
3. Access Moss category in Cactus modules UI.

## More Info

More info can be found on our [README](https://github.com/Datenflieger/MossAddon/blob/main/README.md).
